Class Figurine

product.Product
product.StoreProduct

public class Figurine extends StoreProduct

  • Constructor Details

    • Figurine

      public Figurine(String id, double price, String name, String description, String photo, double averagePunctuation, LocalDate addedDate, int stock, String assignedDimension, String assignedBrand, String assignedMaterial, Category... assignedCategories)
      A figurine's general constructor
      Parameters:
      id - the figurine's id
      price - the figurine's price
      name - the figurine's name
      description - the figurine's description
      photo - the figurine's photo's path
      averagePunctuation - the figurine's average punctuation
      addedDate - the figurine's added date
      stock - the figurine's stock
      assignedDimension - the figurine's dimension
      assignedBrand - the figurine's brand
      assignedMaterial - the figurine's material
      assignedCategories - the figurine's categories

    • Figurine

      public Figurine(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, String assignedDimension, String assignedBrand, String assignedMaterial, Category... categories)

      Parameters:

      name - the figurine's name
      description - the figurine's description
      photo - the figurine's photo
      stock - the figurine's stock
      assignedDimension - the figurine's dimension
      assignedBrand - the figurine's brand
      assignedMaterial - the figurine's material
      categories - the figurine's categories
